hooks.command: bash -c 'STATE="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/state/active.md"; if [ ! -f "$STATE" ]; then echo "{\"ok\": true}"; exit 0; fi; PHASE=$(grep "^current_phase:" "$STATE" | head -1 | sed "s/current_phase: *//;s/\"//g"); if [ -z "$PHASE" ] || [ "$PHASE" = "done" ]; then echo "{\"ok\": true}"; else IP=$(grep "^ip:" "$STATE" | head -1 | sed "s/ip: *//;s/\"//g"); COST=$(grep "^estimated_cost_usd:" "$STATE" | head -1 | sed "s/estimated_cost_usd: *//"); echo "{\"ok\": false, \"reason\": \"Active Lambda instance (phase: $PHASE, IP: $IP, cost: ~\$$COST). Run /lambda status or /lambda terminate before ending.\"}"; fi'
